narrative: Live data remains unavailable: outbound HTTP is blocked by the cloud environment's network allowlist, preventing CoinGecko price pulls and Scrapy Cloud news fetches for the third consecutive session. No price movement or headlines can be reported until coingecko.com, app.zyte.com, and storage.scrapinghub.com are added to the egress allowlist in the cloud environment settings.
worth_watching: Add coingecko.com, app.zyte.com, storage.scrapinghub.com, and api.resend.com to the egress allowlist — all four are blocked
Verify the coindesk_com spider (project 864818) is scheduled and running once egress is restored
Once unblocked, watch Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana for any macro-driven moves that accumulated during the outage window
